coachAM: Your aspiration to be "a lock in young with a clear" vision and "the best worker, the best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" is actively sabotaged by the foundational collapse of your Sleep Protocol and Training, directly correlating to the overwhelming presence of "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness" in your journal entries, indicating a fundamental lack of self-governance when the lights go out. This persistent failure to master your evenings and mornings, particularly evident in your 99% morning entry bias, exposes a critical deficit in self-discipline and delayed gratification, which prevents the sustained energy and mental clarity essential for elite execution and will inevitably cap your trajectory short of your stated ambitions.
